economic_notes: Nation has extensive commercial enterprise portfolio including real estate developments (Takaya, Blue Eagle, Red Eagle, White Eagle, Urban Eagle, Spirit Drum partnerships), construction (SPAL General Constructors), renewable energy (TWN Renewable Energy Holdings), land development, and tourism operations. Modified equity basis used for 35 government business enterprises.
notes: Large and complex consolidation with 6 fully consolidated funds and 35 entities on modified equity basis. Share of income from GBEs was $10.76M in 2022 vs a loss of $1.46M in 2021. Deferred revenue increased significantly by $13.35M during the year. Two BCFN Gaming lines appear in the statement possibly representing different gaming entities. Long-term debt includes $3,228 long-term debt plus $3,757,032 CMHC mortgages. Total_government_transfers estimated from ISC ($8,132,634) + CMHC ($191,886) + BC Hydro ($147,678) + DFO ($442,885) + Government of Canada ($2,243,683) + First Nations Health Authority ($2,246130) + Province of BC ($1,385,351) + MST ($628,298) + FNESTC ($633,711) + New Relationship Trust ($8,400) + BCFN Gaming x2 ($465,000) + Vancouver Fraser Port Authority ($239,454) + Daycare ($74,507) + FNGST ($2,857,418) = ~$19.7M approximate; osr calculated accordingly as remainder. The BCFN Gaming entries may be double-counted.
